subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones of God and handmaids of the All-Merciful! Your letter was received and its contents were made manifest and clear. Praise be unto God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی و اماء رحمن نامه شما رسید و مضمون آشکار و پدید شد حمد خدا را که
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation
